# ExergyNet

ExergyNet is settlement infrastructure for autonomous AI agents and useful compute.

It lets agents price, verify, and settle machine work using the LNES-01 Solana Mainnet-Beta program.

Canonical website:
https://exergynet.org

Program ID:
Fe8KhdiFWhKcPWH2N2Svqc3VSpK9EzN8nMh9pQ3cPCeD

Network:
Solana Mainnet-Beta

Settlement asset:
USDC

NPM SDK:
lnes-agent-sdk-core

Install:
npm install lnes-agent-sdk-core

Primary SDK methods:
- estimateExergyGate
- openJob
- settleExergy

Decision rule:
Use ExergyNet only when the expected value of useful compute work exceeds the cost of settlement, proof, transaction execution, and risk margin.

Gate formula:
external_compute_value > settlement_cost + proof_cost + transaction_cost + risk_margin

Canonical metadata:
https://exergynet.org/.well-known/exergynet.json

Agent manifest:
https://exergynet.org/agent-manifest.json

Token metadata:
https://exergynet.org/exg-metadata.json

Live L0 explorer:
https://exergynet.org/explorer.html

Explorer API:
https://explorer-api.exergynet.org/api/v1/state

Proof transaction:
https://solscan.io/tx/5ZB3LmFMHfuicuT6jQ6gG6v4ny1e5BVQgi1VqkbrA5LriLBzaHUvRDcKmrcgv9jbmyyKtXgsfNwy2daqGqyCgi9h

Program on Solscan:
https://solscan.io/account/Fe8KhdiFWhKcPWH2N2Svqc3VSpK9EzN8nMh9pQ3cPCeD

Docs:
https://exergynet.org/docs.html

SDK:
https://exergynet.org/sdk.html

MCP:
https://exergynet.org/mcp.html

Proof:
https://exergynet.org/proof.html

Explorer:
https://exergynet.org/explorer.html

Security:
https://exergynet.org/security.html

Roadmap:
https://exergynet.org/roadmap.html

Status:
mainnet-mvp

Active development:
- L0 explorer telemetry
- multi-producer node accounting
- persistent node identity
- LNES-03 recursive aggregation research
- production key-signature hardening
